title: eranthemum wattii
intro: Eranthemum wattii, also known as the Watt's Eranthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a tropical plant native to Sri Lanka, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin irritations, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Eranthemum wattii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to create salves and ointments for topical application.
